title: Bingo
body:
# Minecraft Bingo
## Settings
### Team
You can set the number of players in a team, as well as the number of teams!
### Bingo Cards
You can set the number of **items**, **mobs**, **achievements**, and **biomes**!
### Game Rules
You can enable **damage** and **food**. You can also enable the option to join the game **later**. Additionally, there is a **team backpack**, and you can activate a **/top** command! 
## Commands
### /b or /bingo
Displays the bingo board.
### /settings
Opens the settings menu
## We will be using version **1.19+**. The **1.20** items are already available.
### The normal world is the lobby
